role: Aide to Abdul Rahman Ghassemlou; PDKI representative
bio: Abdullah Ghaderi-Azar was a senior aide and representative of the [Democratic Party of Iranian Kurdistan](/orgs/democratic-party-of-iranian-kurdistan) (PDKI). He accompanied PDKI leader [Abdul Rahman Ghassemlou](/people/abdul-rahman-ghassemlou) to Vienna in July 1989 for what both men believed were secret peace negotiations with Iranian government envoys. On 13 July 1989, he was shot dead alongside Ghassemlou and Kurdish mediator Fadel Rasoul in the [Ghassemlou assassination](/events/ghassemlou-assassination-1989). Austrian authorities identified the Iranian intelligence delegation present at the meeting but controversially permitted the suspects to leave Austria without arrest.
editorial_notes: Killed 13 July 1989 in Vienna alongside Ghassemlou. Little biographical detail in public record.
